title: Craftable Leather
description: A survival-friendly utility that allows players to refine rotten flesh into high-quality leather through a simple smelting or curing process.
body:
Tired of having chests overflowing with Rotten Flesh while you struggle to find enough cows for your enchanting setup? This lightweight, vanilla-plus utility solves that problem by introducing a logical tanning process to Minecraft.

This project allows players to recycle mob drops into high-value materials, making it an essential addition to any survival world or modpack focused on realism and resource management.

## ✨ Features
- Simple Integration: No new items or complex machines. It fits seamlessly into the vanilla gameplay loop.
- Modpack Friendly: Works perfectly alongside other mods; if you have a mod that adds "Dried Kelp" or "Jerky," this fills the same niche for leather.

## 🛠️ How to Use

![crafting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b570e81d00eb12b2f9f7b94c6b7edc43caea280.png)

- Collect Rotten Flesh from zombies or husks.
- Place the flesh into crafting table
- Retrieve your Leather and get crafting!

**Note**: This is a server-side compatible utility. If running as a datapack, it does not need to be installed by joining players!
